policy: This manifest is the intake ledger for public document URLs. Local extracted PDFs remain review-only until publicDocumentUrl is supplied and validated.
instructionsForUser: Fill publicDocumentUrl for local PDF rows when you find the exact document-level public URL.
Keep sourcePageUrl as the broader IR page URL.
Do not paste API keys or private download URLs.
If a document URL cannot be found, leave publicDocumentUrl null and keep urlStatus pending_user_url.

schemaRules.rule: Local PDF narrative claims must not be runtime-promoted until a document-level public URL or stable public filing URL is attached.
IR index pages are useful source pages, but they are not sufficient as document-level claim evidence when the local file is a PDF.
DART viewer filings may use the receipt-number viewer URL as the public document URL, but claim promotion still requires extracted filing text and evidence locators.
URL intake is a paper and runtime gate; it should be validated before any narrative claim manifest is generated.
